roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S DEMURRER ALL BUT ONE  OFFENSE WHILE ON BAIL OR OR  ENHNCMNTS FILED

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/987,2/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/CAUSE1/LDPX: 02-04-21 (30TH)/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE ASSET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASEDWITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA2: INTERSECTION OFLAGUNA AND TURK STREETS, SF, CA/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE: 1 HOUR/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/CTORD:SHERIFF AFFADAVIT WARRANT IS RECALLED AND DISCHARGED/MO138572:20004939/
